Blank line here
Video 3: Using prompts and interaction
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

You can’t just ask an AI engine to sell a product for you. By interacting with it… carrying on a conversation, and
using relative prompts, you can get much more effective results.
Blank line here
Video 4: Mistakes to avoid
Sam discusses common mistakes people make when trying to use AI to write.

Blank line here
Video 5: Using AI to write a story
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Sam explains how to get AI to create stories for you… using your specified genre with the option of having it
written in the style of a famous author.
